# GitSnip
> Download any GitHub subdirectory as a zip. No git clone needed.

## What it does
Given a GitHub directory URL, GitSnip downloads all files in that directory and returns them as a zip file.

## Web UI
Visit https://gitsnip.cc and paste any GitHub tree URL.
Or: replace `github.com` with `gitsnip.cc` in the URL bar and press Enter.

## API
- Download zip: GET https://api.gitsnip.cc/v1/download?url={githubUrl}
- Get file info: GET https://api.gitsnip.cc/v1/info?url={githubUrl}
- Auth header:   X-GitHub-Token: {personalAccessToken}  (optional, increases rate limit)

## URL Format
https://gitsnip.cc/{owner}/{repo}/tree/{branch}/{path}

## Docs
https://gitsnip.cc/docs

## Full API docs for AI
https://gitsnip.cc/llms-full.txt
